requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety: TIS 62841 and Controlled-Product Marking
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全：TIS 62841 与受控产品标识
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全：TIS 62841 與受控產品標識

summary.en: Thailand-facing reviewers use TISI-administered requirements for power tools and typically align power-tool electrical safety against TIS IEC 62841 series requirements. The TIS mark can be mandatory for controlled products where the local route is activated, and Thailand uses a 230 V 50 Hz electrical context for mains-based operation. Power-tool evidence should map model, duty cycle, installation environment, and marking scope to this Thailand context before shipment.
summary.zh: 泰国市场通常以 TISI 管理的要求为核心，对电动工具进行与 TIS IEC 62841 系列相对照的电气安全核查。对于受控产品，TIS 标志可为强制要求，且泰国适用 230V 50Hz 电压频率条件。电动工具应按型号、工况、安装场景和标识范围映射到泰国语境后再出货。
summary.zht: 泰國市場通常以 TISI 管理之要求為核心，將電動工具與 TIS IEC 62841 系列做電氣安全對照。對於受控產品，TIS 標誌可為強制要求，且泰國適用 230V 50Hz 電壓頻率條件。電動工具應按型號、工況、安裝場景與標識範圍映射到泰國語境後再出貨。

standards_or_laws: TISI-administered power-tool safety framework, including TIS IEC 62841 references where applicable
TIS mark route for controlled products under current Thai applicability notices
Thailand nominal electricity context of 230 V and 50 Hz for imported electrical appliances

summary.en: China baseline files normally provide GB/T 3883-series evidence and CCC coverage where the product category is CCC-controlled. These are useful for technical mapping but are not Thai TIS mark evidence.
summary.zh: 中国资料通常提供 GB/T 3883 系列依据并按 CCC 要求覆盖。该类文件有助于技术映射，但不能直接视作泰国 TIS 标志证据。
summary.zht: 中國資料通常提供 GB/T 3883 系列依據並按 CCC 要求覆蓋。此類文件有助於技術映射，但不能直接視為泰國 TIS 標誌證據。

standards_or_laws: CCC where the Chinese product category is subject to CCC

gap.en: The common exporter gap is treating 220/380 V China test assumptions as directly portable to Thailand without explicit Thailand mapping to 230 V 50 Hz and controlled-product TIS marking status. The technical files are incomplete until importer and local accountability confirm whether the specific model is in the TISI controlled scope.
gap.zh: 常见差距在于将中国 220/380V 的测试前提直接套用于泰国，而未明确到泰国 230V 50Hz 和受控产品 TIS 标识状态。必须在进口商和本地责任主体确认该具体型号是否在 TISI 受控范围后，技术文件才完整。
gap.zht: 常見差距在於將中國 220/380V 的測試前提直接套用於泰國，而未明確到泰國 230V 50Hz 與受控產品 TIS 標示狀態。必須在進口商及本地責任主體確認該具體型號是否在 TISI 受控範圍後，技術文件才完整。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the model falls into a controlled-power-tool path and TISI mark is required for market-placement documentation in that path.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory within China scope where CCC applies, but CCC/GB/T evidence does not establish Thai TIS mark status.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Thailand-ready for controlled-power-tools until the exact model-to-notice mapping is completed for TIS 62841 scope and TIS marking, and 230 V 50 Hz applicability is confirmed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对受控电动工具而言，在未完成具体型号到 TIS 62841 适用范围与标识范围映射，且未确认 230V 50Hz 适配前，不应视为泰国就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對受控電動工具而言，在未完成具體型號到 TIS 62841 適用範圍與標識範圍映射，且未確認 230V 50Hz 適配前，不應視為泰國就緒。
